summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of CRO/SEO/positioning overhaul. All 16 test cases passed. Homepage rewrite verified with correct conversion flow, new sections, FAQ accordion, mobile responsiveness. All pages have unique SEO titles. CTAs updated to outcome-based messaging.

issues: Page titles have duplicate ' | TrendScout' suffix (e.g., 'Plans and Pricing — Start from £19/mo | TrendScout | TrendScout') - minor SEO issue

action_items: Consider removing duplicate ' | TrendScout' suffix from page titles (appears twice on some pages)
context_for_next_testing_agent: CRO/SEO overhaul complete. Homepage has new conversion flow with all sections in correct order. All CTAs updated to 'Validate Your First Product' or 'Validate a Product'. Mobile responsive at 375px. FAQ accordion works. Prerendered HTML contains correct H1.

homepage_tests.Homepage sections in correct order: PASS - Hero → Trust Bar → How It Works → UK Viability Score → Products → Proof → Who It's For → Pricing → Data Sources → FAQ → Final CTA
